message:
chore: add missing ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Prevent accidentally committing build artifacts, agent progress
files, and other ephemeral files that were found untracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
 # Rust build artifacts
 target/
 target-*/
+target_*/
 Cargo.lock
 fuzz/target/
 fuzz/artifacts/
